# popcn/ui

popcn/ui is a gradient-driven, motion-rich React component library built on Radix UI primitives and Tailwind CSS. Components are distributed via a CLI tool that copies source code directly into your project — you own and customize every line.

## Overview

- **Introduction**: popcn/ui provides 72+ accessible UI components with built-in aurora gradients, glassmorphism, neumorphism, and motion presets. Every component supports `prefers-reduced-motion`.
- **CLI**: The `popcn` CLI (`npx popcn init` / `npx popcn add`) fetches components from the registry and writes them into your `components/ui/` directory.
- **Theming**: CSS custom properties (`--ap-*`) control colors, gradients, animation durations, and motion. Switch themes by swapping a small set of CSS variables.
- **Motion**: Hover effects (`ap-hover-float`, `ap-hover-glow`, `ap-hover-scale`, `ap-hover-tilt`), entrance animations (`ap-enter-pop`, `ap-enter-slide`, `ap-enter-bounce`, `ap-enter-jelly`), exit animations (`ap-exit-fade`, `ap-exit-slide`), and per-component `motionIdle` / `motionClick` variants.

## Installation

```bash
npx popcn init        # scaffolds globals.css, tailwind config, utils
npx popcn add button  # adds a single component
npx popcn add button card dialog  # adds multiple components
npx popcn list        # shows all available components
```

### Requirements
- React 18+ / Next.js 13+ (App Router recommended)
- Tailwind CSS 3
- Node.js 18+

## Design System

### Skins
Skins define the overall visual language. Choose one during `popcn init`.

- **Aurora** (default) — Gradient-driven design with aurora glow effects
- **NeumoPop** — Soft neumorphism with pop accents
- **GlassPop** — Apple-style liquid glass with frosted, liquid, and lite presets

### Themes
Themes control the color palette via CSS variables. Apply by adding a `data-theme` attribute or swapping CSS variables.

- **Cosmic** (default) — Indigo / Purple / Sky
- **Sunset** — Pink / Orange / Yellow
- **Neon** — Cyan / Magenta / Lime
- **Mono** — Grayscale minimal

### CSS Custom Properties
All tokens use the `--ap-` prefix:
- Colors: `--ap-primary`, `--ap-secondary`, `--ap-aurora-1`, `--ap-aurora-2`, `--ap-aurora-3`
- Gradient: `--ap-grad-angle`, `--ap-shine-angle`, `--ap-shine-width`
- Animation: `--ap-dur-1` (100ms) through `--ap-dur-5` (800ms)
- Easing: `--ap-ease-pop`, `--ap-ease-soft`, `--ap-ease-snap`, `--ap-ease-spring`
- Motion: `--ap-motion` (1 or 0), `--ap-motion-scale`

### Utility Classes
- `.bg-aurora` / `.text-aurora` — Aurora gradient background / text
- `.glass` — Glassmorphism effect
- `.shine-effect` — Animated shimmer overlay
- `.ap-grad-{t,tr,r,br,b,bl,l,tl}` — Gradient direction
- `.ap-hover-{float,glow,scale,tilt}` — Hover effects
- `.ap-enter-{pop,slide,bounce,jelly}` — Entrance animations
- `.ap-exit-{fade,slide}` — Exit animations

### Component Variant Pattern
Components use `class-variance-authority` (CVA) for variants:
```tsx
const buttonVariants = cva([...baseClasses], {
  variants: {
    variant: { aurora: [...], glass: [...], ghost: [...] },
    size: { sm: "...", md: "...", lg: "..." },
    motionIdle: { none: "", float: "...", shine: "...", wave: "..." },
    motionClick: { none: "", pop: "", snap: "", bounce: "", wiggle: "", jelly: "" },
  },
})
```

## Components

### Layout
- [Aspect Ratio](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/aspect-ratio) — Maintain consistent aspect ratios for media
- [Card](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/card) — Card container with glass, aurora-border, and solid variants
- [Resizable](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/resizable) — Resizable panel component
- [Scroll Area](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/scroll-area) — Scrollable area component
- [Separator](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/separator) — Visual separator with aurora gradient option
- [Sidebar](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/sidebar) — Sidebar component with collapsible options
- [Empty](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/empty) — Empty state layout with header and actions

### Forms
- [Button](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/button) — Aurora-styled button with gradient variants and motion presets
- [Button Group](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/button-group) — Grouped buttons with shared borders and separators
- [Calendar](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/calendar) — Calendar component with custom day styles
- [Checkbox](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/checkbox) — Checkbox with aurora gradient and glass variants
- [Color Picker](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/color-picker) — Color picker component with RGB and HSL sliders
- [Combobox](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/combobox) — Combobox with searchable list and chips
- [Date Picker](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/date-picker) — Date picker component with calendar popover
- [Field](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/field) — Form field layout helpers
- [File Upload](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/file-upload) — File upload component with drag and drop support
- [Form](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/form) — React Hook Form helpers and slots
- [Input](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/input) — Form input with aurora, glass, and ghost variants
- [Input Group](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/input-group) — Input group with addons and buttons
- [Input OTP](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/input-otp) — One-time password input with slots
- [Label](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/label) — Form label component with aurora gradient text option
- [Loading Button](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/loading-button) — Button component with loading state
- [Multi Select](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/multi-select) — Multi-select component with checkboxes and badges
- [Native Select](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/native-select) — Native select dropdown with custom styling
- [Radio Group](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/radio-group) — Radio group component for single selection
- [Rating](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/rating) — Rating component with star display
- [Select](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/select) — Dropdown select with glass styling
- [Slider](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/slider) — Slider component for range selection
- [Split Button](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/split-button) — Split button component with dropdown menu
- [Switch](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/switch) — Toggle switch with aurora gradient when active
- [Textarea](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/textarea) — Textarea component for multi-line input

### Data Display
- [Accordion](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/accordion) — Collapsible content panels with smooth animations
- [Avatar](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/avatar) — Avatar with size options and glow ring variants
- [Badge](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/badge) — Status badge with aurora, glass, and outline variants
- [Carousel](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/carousel) — Carousel with embla controls and navigation
- [Chart](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/chart) — Chart container and tooltip helpers for Recharts
- [Code Block](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/code-block) — Code block component with syntax highlighting and copy functionality
- [Data Table](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/data-table) — Data table component with sorting, filtering, and pagination
- [Kbd](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/kbd) — Keyboard key indicator component
- [Notification Badge](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/notification-badge) — Notification badge component for displaying counts and dots
- [Progress](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/progress) — Progress bar component
- [Skeleton](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/skeleton) — Loading skeleton with aurora shimmer animation
- [Spinner](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/spinner) — Loading spinner component
- [Stepper](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/stepper) — Stepper component for multi-step processes
- [Table](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/table) — Table component with rows and cells
- [Tag](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/tag) — Tag component with removable option
- [Timeline](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/timeline) — Timeline component for displaying chronological events
- [Tree View](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/tree-view) — Tree view component for displaying hierarchical data
- [Typography](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/typography) — Typography component for consistent text styling

### Navigation
- [Breadcrumb](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/breadcrumb) — Breadcrumb navigation with separators and overflow
- [Command](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/command) — Command palette with search and groups
- [Context Menu](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/context-menu) — Context menu with submenus and radio items
- [Dropdown Menu](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/dropdown-menu) — Dropdown menu with glass panel styling
- [Menubar](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/menubar) — Menubar component with submenus and radio items
- [Navigation Menu](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/navigation-menu) — Navigation menu with dropdowns and links
- [Pagination](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/pagination) — Pagination component with page navigation
- [Tabs](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/tabs) — Tab navigation with aurora, default, and underline variants

### Overlay
- [Alert Dialog](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/alert-dialog) — Confirmation dialog with aurora-styled actions
- [Dialog](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/dialog) — Modal dialog with glass backdrop and aurora glow
- [Drawer](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/drawer) — Slide-in drawer with multiple directions
- [Hover Card](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/hover-card) — Hover card with popover content
- [Popover](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/popover) — Popover component with positioning
- [Sheet](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/sheet) — Sheet component (side panel)
- [Tooltip](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/tooltip) — Tooltip with glass styling

### Feedback
- [Alert](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/alert) — Inline alerts with default and destructive styles
- [Sonner](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/sonner) — Toast notifications with aurora glow effects
- [Toast](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/toast) — Toast notification API (re-exported from sonner)

### Toggle
- [Collapsible](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/collapsible) — Show and hide content with a trigger
- [Toggle](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/toggle) — Toggle button with aurora styling variants
- [Toggle Group](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/toggle-group) — Group of toggle buttons with shared styling

### Utility
- [Copy Button](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/copy-button) — Copy button component with clipboard functionality
- [Item](https://popcnui.com/docs/components/item) — List item component with media, content, and actions

## MCP Server

popcn/ui includes an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that lets AI coding assistants browse and add components directly.

### Setup
```bash
npx popcn mcp init --client claude   # for Claude Code
npx popcn mcp init --client cursor   # for Cursor
npx popcn mcp init --client vscode   # for VS Code
```

### Manual Configuration
Add to your `.mcp.json` (Claude Code) or equivalent:
```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "popcn": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["popcn@latest", "mcp"]
    }
  }
}
```

### Available Tools
- `list_components` — List all available components with descriptions
- `search_components` — Fuzzy search for components by name or description
- `view_component` — View component details including full source code
- `get_add_command` — Get the CLI command to add components to a project
- `get_setup_guide` — Get the full setup guide for initializing popcn/ui
